name: dialogue
description: Extract all spoken dialogue from the text. For each piece of dialogue, identify the speaker and the exact spoken text. Use the exact text from the source — do not paraphrase.

examples.text: "To be, or not to be," Hamlet said, staring into the void. Horatio replied, "My lord, I came to see your father's funeral."

extractions.text: To be, or not to be,
My lord, I came to see your father's funeral.
